reference: I just had an Magnetic Resonance Imaging on my lower back because I have had hip and knee pain for a year, and all X-rays showed nothing. The results came back and I have mild disk protrusion, and there may be a tear on the sac surrounding the spinal column. My doctor's advice is to see a neurologist. Is this serious? Do I need to see a doctor immediately? Should I be limited in my physical activities?
text: I just had a magnetic resonance imaging on my lower back because I have had hip and knee pain for a year, and all X-rays showed nothing. The results came back, and I have mild disc protrusion and immediate tear on the sac surrounding the spine. My doctor's advice is to see a neurologist. Is this serious? Do I need to see a doctor immediately? Should I be limited in my physical activities?
